mnemonics.title: NP-Complete Problems
mnemonics.content: SAT, TSP, Clique - Some Annoying Troubles Start Coming Later In Quick Exams

acronyms.usage: Used to denote problems that are both NP and NP-Hard

visualTips.visualization: Imagine P as a small circle inside NP, with NP-Hard as a larger overlapping circle. NP-Complete is the intersection area.

analogies.analogy: Like a master key that can open all NP locks (problems), but might require special handling (non-polynomial time)
